proposals.rationale: Store trend 14d: previous 7d had 24,297 seen, 653 purchases, revenue $186,215.91; current 7d has 5,289 seen, 146 purchases, revenue $35,707.83 (-78% WoW decline). Only hero_grid (slot 10) drives traffic, dominated by moda_mujer (2,845 seen, 83 purchases, 2.9% purchase_rate). Meanwhile accesorios_tech shows 386 seen, 28 purchases, 7.3% purchase_rate — 2.5x higher conversion — with no dedicated slot. Creating popular at slot 50 lets the system surface high-conversion categories. Expected: revenue_ratio improves from current 0.94 toward 1.0+, recovering portion of the 507 lost weekly purchases. Source: read_metrics(7d) + read_metrics(14d).

Cart surface has 0 served/seen in 7d (low_sample store flag) and existing placements (slots 20,30) have no_impression_logging. However, cart is a high-intent surface. Categories with strong conversion — moda_mujer 83 purchases/7d, accesorios_tech 28 purchases/7d at 7.3% rate — are natural add-on candidates. Creating cart_addons at slot 40 (free slot, range 20-90) is a low-cost exploration: if it logs impressions, it can capture incremental revenue from checkout-ready users. Expected: if impressions log, target +5 incremental purchases/week. Source: read_metrics(7d) cart + home category data.

finalText:
Ambas propuestas aceptadas. Cierro con el resumen.

---

## Resumen

| # | Acción | Placement ID | Tier | Status |
|---|--------|-------------|------|--------|
| 1 | **CREATE popular @ home slot 50** | `a333e2e7-...` | low | ✅ approved |
| 2 | **CREATE cart_addons @ cart slot 40** | `fffeea65-...` | low | ✅ approved |

**Evidencia que las justifica:**
- **Propuesta 1**: Trend 14d mostró caída del -78% WoW (24.297 → 5.289 seen, 653 → 146 purchases). Hero_grid (slot 10) domina con moda_mujer (2,9% purchase rate) pero accesorios_tech convierte al **7,3%** (28 purchases / 386 seen en 7d). Slot 50 libre, popular section puede surfear alta conversión. Revenue_ratio actual 0.94 vs holdout.
- **Propuesta 2**: Cart sin métricas (0 served), pero alta intención de compra. Slot 40 disponible. Exploración de bajo riesgo con TTL de 72h.

**Lo que espero ver en `since_change` la próxima vez:**
- Home slot 50: que loguee impresiones (no repita `no_impression_logging`), que ctr_seen ≥ 0.8 y que genere al menos 15-20 purchases/semana de categorías como accesorios_tech para mejorar el revenue_ratio sobre holdout.
- Cart slot 40: que loguee impresiones y aporte compras incrementales desde checkout (target: +5 purchases/semana).
